brief: The wires are busy: From Specs to Tickets: Automating Jira Setup with Node.js and the Jira API · Daily pill can double survival time for deadliest cancer, trial shows · Laos cave survivors help with plan to find last two missing men. This brief refreshes every ten minutes with live AI, technology, and world reporting.
